ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team conducting the experiment */,
  "sparsity" REAL /* Sparsity setting for the experiment */,
  "time_multiplier" REAL /* Time multiplier used in the experiment */,
  "init_method" TEXT /* Initialization method used in the experiment */,
  "begin" INTEGER /* Starting point of the training data */,
  "end" INTEGER /* Ending point of the training data */,
  "freq" INTEGER /* Frequency of data points */,
  "label_smoothing" REAL /* Label smoothing value */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user for the team */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., active, disbanded) */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., hyperparameter, configuration) */,
  "param_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the parameter (e.g., training, model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the result belongs to */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the result is from */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "metric_group" TEXT /* Group or category of the metric (e.g., training, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES experiment_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number within the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, failed, running) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the run */,
  "run_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the run in minutes */,
  "run_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the run was executed (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "run_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_runs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., action, error, warning) */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the action */,
  "affected_row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_assigned_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
